'''Zakar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] stationed on [[Garos IV]]. He was ill-tempered and known for taking frustration out on his subordinates.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|3|Mission to Zila|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
